reviews.text: 10/10 experience with Joe and Robin! As the one who was getting proposed to, Joe made me feel so comfortable in front of the camera. He gave us the space to be ourselves, completely capturing the moment. Nothing felt forced! Robin did an amazing job editing our photos and in return, we received about 80 pictures, some in black and white too. It didn't seem like anything was missing from that day and that is because of Joe and Robin's wonderful talent as photographers. Not to mention, there was an option to have the moment video recorded...if you can, choose this option as well! The few minutes of a proposal is a whirlwind so it is nice to be able to look back and watch exactly what happened. I wish we could afford to bring them to GA for our wedding. :)

Joe and Robin are absolutely incredible photographers. Joe was our photographer for our wedding day, and the photos are absolutely incredible, and I can’t stop looking at them. He captured the day as it unfolded, and the photos tell the story of the day. When I look at the photos it feels like  I am reliving my wedding day. He did an amazing job of capturing the little moments, and none of our photos feel forced or staged. My absolute favorite photos are the candid ones he took when we didn’t even realize he was there. You should hire them for your wedding day.

Joe was absolutely amazing. Absolutely no complaints. When I reached out to him regarding my plans for a surprise proposal he did not hold anything back on recommendations on where to pop the question! My fiance and I are from GA and came here for a long overdue vacation so I had nothing to base off of aside from Google reviews and forums regarding scenic locations to propose.

After the big question, he was very informative on the different poses to get into for the best photos and as you can see they turned out amazing.

The surprise part of it was truly magical. Sharing locations, exactly where to stand, sunglasses/no sunglasses, every detail was to the T. Pricing was perfectly reasonable as well.

Thank you again for capturing our magical moment and if anyone is looking for a similar photographer, this is your sign! Choose them!

Joe and Robin were nice, fast, knowledgeable, and helpful. We got engagement, and wedding photos and both times they helped with best times for certain locations and tips and tricks for each location. I felt like they weren’t just photographers for our events, they were also like planners, and willing to help. They helped us a lot during our wedding day, and also returned the photos extremely fast. I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for pictures in Colorado Denver/ summit area.

Wow! What can we say?! Amazing!!!! Joe did our photos for our engagement shoot and Robin did our wedding. We wanted more candid and natural looking photos and we got that plus so much more. The pictures allowed us to relive both of those days and feel as though we were right back in those moments again. Joe and Robin are so kind and attentive and made us feel so special.
